title: Rail Vikas Nigam is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rail Vikas Nigam is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Warehouse Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
